name: Job List App
description: An application to manage and track job applications, including features for adding, editing, and deleting job entries, as well as categorizing them by status, and adding phases.

name: To-Do List App
shortDescription: Simple ToDo List to learn Django
description: Nothing fancy, just a simple ToDo List application to learn Django. Force completion and deployment.

name: Actualiti Company Website
description: A website for Actualiti to showcase their services, projects, and team. It will include sections for about the company, services, projects, team, and contact information.

name: Scanalog
shortDescription: Capturing physical DVD collections in a digital format
description: An application to digitize and organize physical DVD collections. Users can scan their DVDs, add metadata, and manage their digital library. Maybe pivot on development platform to Expo

name: Sweepstake Website
shortDescription: A personal website for managing sweepstakes
description: A website to manage and participate in sweepstakes. Users can enter sweepstakes, view results, and manage their entries. Backendless, data fetched and scores computed by TypeScript, automatically using github actions to run on a schedule. Frontend built with React, TailwindCSS, and DaisyUI.

name: This Project List Page
shortDescription: A personal project list page to track and organise my projects
description: A personal project list page to track and organise my projects. Keep track of what I've started, in progress, and completed.

name: Big Data PoC
shortDescription: A proof of concept for big data processing client-side
description: A proof of concept project to explore big data processing techniques and technologies. It will include experiments with data ingestion, processing, and visualization.

name: ngx-zod-interceptor
shortDescription: Library for validating Angular HTTP requests and responses using Zod schemas
description: A library for validating Angular HTTP requests and responses using Zod schemas. It provides a simple and type-safe way to ensure data integrity in your Angular applications.

name: Recipe Book Companion Box
shortDescription: Needs a snappier name, but it's a companion box of herbs/spices
description: Avoid the frustration of missing ingredients with this companion box of herbs and spices, nicely packaged for convenience. Ideal gift.  Needs to scrape book, find all ingredients, provide some of the harder to find ones.

name: Goal Setting App
shortDescription: An app to help users set and achieve their goals
description: Uses AI to help users set long term goals, break them down into smaller tasks, and track their progress. It will include features for setting deadlines, reminders, and providing motivational content. Could also include a social aspect for sharing goals and progress with friends. Could also include a journaling feature for reflecting on progress and challenges.

name: Personal Finance Dashboard (DEMO)
shortDescription: A dashboard to track and manage personal finances
description: Practice/Example application. Help users track and manage their personal finances, find savings, upload data from supermarket shop, multiple back accounts and classifications.

name: Cranky Hippo
description: An application to aggregate and publish local events, providing users with up-to-date information on what's happening in their area. It could include features for event discovery, categorization, and notifications.  Users can scan and have read flyers etc.
